_comment: evaluation-report.example.json — synthetic placeholder for the gitignored evaluation-report.json that `bun run eval:quick` / `eval:full` (cli.ts eval:batch) writes at the repo root. Real reports embed customer intake data; this placeholder shows only the schema, with one completed and one failed case.
_shape: { summary, results, dimension_performance, flaw_frequency } — summary + results from lib/evaluation/runner.ts runBatchEvaluation (per-case scores from lib/evaluation/comparator.ts compare); dimension_performance mirrors summary.dimension_performance ([] unless populated); flaw_frequency mirrors summary.top_flaws.

dimensions.rationale: Proposed standard; ground truth ran complex
Two weeks shorter than actual delivery

scores.summary: Strong integration and feature coverage; tier under-called

remediations: Bumped tier to complex based on integrated-system count

results.error: Pipeline execution failed: missing required intake fields
